title: Exploit reports in Fortnite

evidence.content:
Thought I'd give it a go but oh my...

I downloaded it, got a lionel messi in my team as a FREE player. ON THE FIRST FREE CARD DROP. I mean who does that? I've certainly never come across a P2W game giving me something like that before, No P2W game does that, Why would they? ..... it was ALL SHINY,
just a pay to win games

Don't even bother trying

I'm nearing 400 hrs on this game and I won't even talk about the ♥♥♥♥♥♥ p2w gacha system it has because I've paid for it. But the real problem that I believe most of the players are all talking about is the SMART ASSIST function. I feel like it's just an excuse for the game
P2W WHALE SCRIPT GAME, AND WHY THERE'S NO SETTING FOR CHANGING THE ICON BUTTON ? I USE PS CONTROLLER NOT XBOX !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

ai_summary: Detected 4 Steam reviews reporting exploit issues in Fortnite. Total signal strength: 12 (higher = more actionable). Top report: "Thought I'd give it a go but oh my... I downloaded it, got a lionel messi in my team as a FREE player. ON THE FIRST FREE CARD DROP. I mean who does…"
suggested_investigations: Reproduce exploit conditions in isolated environment
Determine patch priority and rollout plan
